game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **THE GAME OF LIFE: Road Trip**: THE GAME OF LIFE: Road Trip is a digital board game for 1-3 players in offline pass-and-play mode, or up to 4 players in online multiplayer, where participants navigate a themed island map. Gameplay involves tapping to spin a virtual wheel, moving their chosen character peg a corresponding number of spaces along a linear path. Landing on specific board spaces triggers various events, such as collecting unique souvenirs, taking pictures, or participating in competitive mini-games like scuba diving or sand sculpture building, which are resolved through simple tap-based interactions. The primary objective is to accumulate the "most and happiest memories," which serve as the game's scoring metric and are saved in a personal scrapbook. The game concludes when all players reach the final destination on the board, with the player possessing the highest memory count declared the winner, encouraging replayability to complete the souvenir collection.
game_info.description: Navigate a tropical island board game collecting memories and souvenirs! Spin the wheel to move forward, land on special spaces to collect items, take photos, or compete in mini-games. Reach the finish with the most happiness points to win. Complete challenges quickly for bonus points!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Spin the wheel / Confirm action
ARROW KEYS: Navigate menu selections
Z: Quick action in mini-games
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and wheel spinning. Validates that the player can spin the wheel, move along the board path, and that position updates correctly. Ensures the game doesn't crash during normal movement.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Continuously spin the wheel when available and move the player piece forward. Track position changes to verify movement is working. Complete a few turns to test the basic gameplay loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully spins wheel multiple times, moves along the board without errors, and position tracking shows consistent forward progress. The game remains stable through multiple turns.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully spins wheel multiple times, moves along the board without errors, and position tracking shows consistent forward progress. The game remains stable through multiple turns.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by optimally playing through the entire game. Validates that reaching the finish line triggers the win state correctly. Tests memory collection and scoring mechanics throughout gameplay.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Play optimally by spinning the wheel and completing all mini-games and events perfectly. Collect maximum memories at each opportunity. Aim to reach the finish line with the highest possible score by engaging with all game mechanics.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the finish line and triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score reflects collected memories and completed challenges. Game properly transitions to victory screen with statistics.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests mini-game mechanics and event handling. Validates that landing on special spaces triggers appropriate events, mini-games function correctly, and rewards are properly awarded.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Target special board spaces by tracking position and wheel results. Participate in mini-games when triggered, attempting to score maximum points. Verify that souvenirs and photos are collected when landing on respective spaces.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Mini-games activate correctly, player can interact with them, and rewards are added to inventory and score. Special events trigger consistently based on board space type.
